title: Mirror an entire group in two different boards

posts.author: willi (Willi Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hiiiiii!

I have a group, “Core Team” that I would like to appear in two different boards “HR” and “Legal”

Both of my boards have the exact same column structure.

Is there a way that the “Core Team” group can live in both boards so that any changes in the “HR” board will be reflected in the “Legal” board and visa versa?

Thanks

P.S. I do NOT want to add “connect board” and/or “mirror” columns.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @willi - without using mirroring the quick answer is no in native monday. However, you could utilize an app like VLOOKUP Auto-Link or MIC to sync changes between boards.

Hope this helps,
Mark
